summary: Comprehensive testing of SLS Fleet Management approval hierarchy changes and vehicle form multi-step flow. Fixed a critical bug in VehicleForm.js that was causing React runtime errors when empty string dates were sent to API. All 12 backend tests passed. UI testing confirmed: Admin read-only access to approvals with comment functionality, Checker/Approver role-specific action buttons, Maker sidebar without Approvals link, 3-step vehicle creation flow working.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed VehicleForm.js: Empty string dates in formData were causing 422 validation errors from Pydantic. Added cleanedData processing to convert empty strings to null before API call.
Error handling improved: Pydantic validation errors (array format) are now properly extracted and displayed as string messages instead of being rendered as React children.
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test vehicles (UITEST71175, TESTAPI001, etc.) via UI and API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified: (1) Approval hierarchy: Admin is READ-ONLY with 'Add Query/Comment' button visible, Checker sees 'Verify & Forward to Approver' and 'Return to Maker', Approver sees 'Final Approve & Publish' and 'Reject'. (2) VehicleForm.js is 3-step wizard working: Step 1 saves vehicle, Step 2 shows document upload rows (RC, Insurance, Fitness, Tax, PUC, Permit, National Permit) with expiry dates and dropzones showing max 25MB, Step 3 shows review summary. (3) Sidebar: Maker sees My Submissions but NOT Approvals, Checker/Approver see Approvals but NOT My Submissions, Admin sees both.
passed_tests: 1. Admin login - cannot see approve/reject buttons in Approvals queue
2. Admin login - sees 'Add Query/Comment' button for active approvals
3. Admin read-only notice displayed on Approvals page
4. Checker login - sees 'Verify & Forward to Approver' and 'Return to Maker' buttons
5. Checker does NOT see 'Final Approve' button (correct)
6. Approver login - sees 'Final Approve & Publish' and 'Reject' buttons for checked items
7. Approver does NOT see 'Verify & Forward' checker button (correct)
8. Maker sidebar - has My Submissions, does NOT have Approvals
9. Checker sidebar - has Approvals, does NOT have My Submissions
10. Approver sidebar - has Approvals, does NOT have My Submissions
11. Admin sidebar - has both Approvals AND My Submissions
12. VehicleForm Step 1 - Vehicle Details form saves to backend
13. VehicleForm Step 2 - Shows all 7 document types (RC, Insurance, Fitness, Tax, PUC, Permit, National Permit)
14. VehicleForm Step 2 - Document rows show expiry date field and file dropzone with 25MB limit
15. VehicleForm Step 3 - Review & Submit shows vehicle summary and uploaded documents status
16. VehicleForm - Final submit redirects to My Submissions
17. My Submissions - Shows stats cards (Pending Check, Awaiting Approval, Approved, Rejected)
18. My Submissions - Shows newly created vehicle with 'Pending Check' status
12 backend API tests: admin blocked from check/approve (403), admin can add comments, checker/approver role filtering, full workflow test

bug_fixed.issue: React runtime error: Objects are not valid as a React child (found: object with keys {type, loc, msg, input, ctx, url})
bug_fixed.root_cause: VehicleForm was sending empty strings for date fields (rc_expiry, etc.) which Pydantic rejected with 422 validation error. The error response (array of validation objects) was being rendered directly instead of extracted.
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Added cleanedData processing in handleSaveVehicle() to convert empty strings to null. Added proper error handling for Pydantic validation errors (array format) to extract and display error messages.
